question_text: Let 𝑋ଵ, 𝑋ଶ, …, 𝑋଻ be a random sample from a normal population with mean 0 and variance 𝜃> 0. Let ଶ+ 𝑋ଶ ଶ+ ⋯+ 𝑋଻ ଶ .

options.C: onsider the following statements: (I) The statistics 𝐾 and 𝑋ଵ ଶ+ 𝑋ଶ ଶ+ ⋯+ 𝑋଻ ଶ are independent. (II) ଶ has an 𝐹-distribution with 2 and 7 degrees of freedom. (III) 𝐸(𝐾ଶ) = ଺ଷ . Then which of the above statements is/are true?
